name: Vera Duskwood
learned: Vera Duskwood is a shadowy figure who uses dark magic to further her own hidden agenda. She is aware of Finn’s chaos powers and intends to manipulate them for her own purposes. Her knowledge of forbidden magic is vast, and she is willing to do anything to achieve her goals.
currently: Vera Duskwood is working in the shadows, planning how to seize control of Finn’s chaos magic. She has her own dark schemes and uses manipulation and intrigue to further her cause, while remaining hidden from the kingdom’s rulers.
lifestyle: Vera Duskwood spends most of her time in the Shadow Realm, conducting dark rituals and experimenting with forbidden magic. She plots in secrecy, rarely seen but always watching. Her days are spent in her lair, studying dark grimoire texts and preparing for the right moment to strike.
